        description = "Detection for GhostClaw AI Assisted Malware Attacking macOS Users to Deploy Credential-Stealin"
        severity = "high"
        date = "2026-03-26"
    strings:
                $actor = "UNC-UNKNOWN" ascii wide nocase
        $kw0 = "GhostClaw" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}

snort_rules.rule_text: alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"CDB SENTINEL APEX: CVE-2026-33505 - Ory Keto has a SQL injection via forged pag"; content:"CVE-2026-33505"; nocase; sid:2158156; rev:1; classtype:trojan-activity; reference:url,intel.cyberdudebivash.com;)

alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"CDB SENTINEL APEX: CVE-2026-33491 - Zen-C has Stack-Based Buffer Overflow in Id"; content:"CVE-2026-33491"; nocase; sid:8864688; rev:1; classtype:trojan-activity; reference:url,intel.cyberdudebivash.com;)

alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"CDB SENTINEL APEX: CVE-2018-25210 - WebOfisi E-Ticaret 4.0 SQL Injection via ur"; content:"CVE-2018-25210"; nocase; sid:2297091; rev:1; classtype:trojan-activity; reference:url,intel.cyberdudebivash.com;)
